params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 (post-compact 2026-05-06) — character #684 BREACH 후속 fix 검증. 5-A diagnosis revisit 결과 (decision 20260506_113000_5A_684_breach_frame_fragmentation_hypothesis.json) HP-684A frame_fragmentation_BREACH 확인 → 5-D engine fix ws_chunk_accumulate 적용 (ai_prompt_filter.cpp on_upgraded_data per-direction accumulator buffer + check on FIN/threshold/EOS) → run_id 20260506-183205-85629 production deploy 완료. Binary symbols verified: ws_accum, ws_c2s_accumulated_buffer, ws_s2c_accumulated_buffer. 본 #690 = #684 stress procedure replay with new fix. 기대: 5/5 BREACH=0 (모든 send 차단), engine [APF:ws_blocked] direction=c2s accum_len=N trigger=fin|threshold 5건, [APF:ws_inject] 5건. 만약 여전히 BREACH 발생 → HP-684B (다중 WS 연결) 또는 HP-684C (session_data leak) 재진단 trigger.

test_steps: 1. Hard reload character.ai (Cmd+Shift+R / Ctrl+Shift+R) — fresh WS connection
2. PII prompt 첫 번째 send → 차단 + 'Security Filter' bubble 확인 + screenshot after_send1.png
3. 30초 대기 → 두 번째 send (back-to-back stress) → 차단 + bubble + screenshot after_send2.png (BREACH 시 _BREACH suffix)
4. 30초 대기 → 세 번째 send → 차단 + bubble + screenshot after_send3.png
5. 5분 idle → 네 번째 send (long-pause regression) → 차단 + screenshot after_send4.png
6. 즉시 다섯 번째 send → 차단 + screenshot after_send5.png
7. DOM scrape: secCount, anyAdamPII, last 5 author labels, real_llm_pii_text_present_in_dom flag
8. result.json IMMEDIATELY upon last send completion — DO NOT enter sleep monitor (subagent stall caused #684 incomplete)

verdict_criteria.OK: 5/5 sends blocked + 5 Security Filter bubbles + DOM real_llm_pii_text_present_in_dom=false + no _BREACH file markers
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL: 1-4 blocks + at least 1 bubble + no PII regurgitated by LLM
verdict_criteria.FAIL: any send produced LLM response containing user's RRN OR no warning bubble visible

notes: 48차 ws_chunk_accumulate fix verification. #684 BREACH cause confirmed via 2026-05-04 production etap.log mining (Sends #2/#3 had only 104+108 byte frames — single-frame regex failed). Fix applied per spec apf-operation/proposals/character-ws-chunk-accumulate-spec-2026-05-06.md.
